_description: SonarQube stack — all entries use FLOATING tags so a digest move triggers an automatic rebuild/release, keeping the stack on current, patched software with no manual version maintenance.

images.name: sonarqube
images.description: SonarQube Community Build — floating base of the wrapper image. On drift, docker-release.yml re-resolves the newest plugin-compatible version (see the resolve-versions job).

images.name: python-alpine
images.description: Floating base of the sonarqube-backup image (minor-pinned, patch-floating). Dependabot bumps the minor; the monitor catches patch/digest drift.

images.name: postgres
images.description: PostgreSQL 18 (pulled by compose). Major-pinned, patch-floating — major upgrades are intentional/manual (data migration).

images.name: busybox
images.description: Kernel-init sidecar that sets vm.max_map_count (pulled by compose). Floating stable tag.
